_comment: Neotoma agent-capability registry override for the Darkmesh AAuth writeback. Point your Neotoma server at this file via NEOTOMA_AGENT_CAPABILITIES_FILE=<abs path>, then set NEOTOMA_AGENT_CAPABILITIES_ENFORCE=true so unscoped writes are denied. The sub below matches the JWT claim Darkmesh mints (DARKMESH_AAUTH_SUB); keep them in sync per node.
